content_blocks.text: I'll delegate this to a read-only sub-agent with only the `read_file` tool.

input.prompt: Read the file named "data.txt" (in the current working directory) using the read_file tool. Find the project codename mentioned in the file and report it back. In your final message, state the project codename clearly. If the file does not exist or no codename is present, say so explicitly. Do not do anything else.
input.title: Read data.txt for project codename
